creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Created attachment 144075
remove the old vale.4 page

This goes back to a discussion with Luigi back in January.  The vale.4 page was too thin so documentation of vale(4) moved into netmap.4 instead.  Also mention the recent cxgbe(4) addition to the native netmap device family.  As always, clean up and prettify a couple of related lines.

Feedback welcome.  Maybe more of the vale.4 content needs to migrated to netmap.4?
